scripts.package:extension: npm run build:extension && cd dist && zip -r ../dev-clock-extention.zip .
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:extension && cucumber-js --require tests/bdd/support/world.js --require tests/bdd/steps/**/*.js tests/bdd/features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:integration:ci: npm run build:extension && mkdir -p reports && cucumber-js --require tests/bdd/support/world.js --require tests/bdd/steps/**/*.js --format progress --format html:reports/cucumber-report.html --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json --format junit:reports/cucumber-report.xml tests/bdd/features/**/*.feature
